Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy plug a monster bowtie powerplant into the newly painted Chevelle Project.
Video.title: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Image.alt: Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant
Highwayman Payoff and Chevelle Power Plant

Video.summary: We enhance Project Crazy Horse with new suspensions, wheels, and an upgraded axle.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Frame & Chassis

Video.summary: We install a new front axle and suspension on Project Crazy Horse, rejuvenating an old Ford Bronco.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Engine

Video.summary: We're fitting our 509 cubic inch Big Block into its new 1956 Chevrolet 210 home.
Video.title: ’56 Chevy Goes Gasser

Video.summary: We're revamping a 1966 Ford Bronco with a new engine and drive train, prepping it for the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Drive Train

Video.summary: We delve into reconstructing our rusty '66 Ford Bronco amidst extensive repairs and modern upgrades.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Image.alt: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse, the ’66 bronco, is back from the paint shop and looking good.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Paint

Video.summary: Crazy Horse is going together fast with everything from seats, to roll bar, to fender flares.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Seats

Video.summary: The final touches are added to Project Crazy Horse: winch, bumpers, and lights.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Completion

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse is let loose on the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Special

Video.summary: This old Bronco is start of Project Crazy Horse and Stacey has got a mess on his hands.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Rust Replacement

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy get to work restoring the engine bay and front suspension.
Video.title: Cobra Cleanup

Video.summary: Our Mustang Cobra Project Sydewinder gets its aggressive exhaust system.
Video.title: Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Image.alt: Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang
Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang
Installing a NASCAR Style Exhaust System on a Foxbody Mustang

Video.summary: Our ’81 Mustang Cobra gets fuel and cooling systems.
Video.title: Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody

Image.alt: Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody
Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody
Installing a Cooling and Fuel System in a Cobra Foxbody

Video.summary: To keep Project Sydewinder on the ground we need a little help.
Video.title: Installing a Mustang Foxbody Wing

Video.summary: Project Sydewinder get some custom paint and graphics plus demystifying older car terms and labels.
Video.title: How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours

Image.alt: How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours
How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours
How-To Custom Paint Graphics in 2 hours

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: "Dark Matters," Jason Mode's '68 C10, is a subtly modded, powerful truck with killer black and red style.
Video.title: Jason Mode - Dark Matters C10

Video.summary: Chris Ryan's "Scarlet Lady," a custom '56 Continental Mark II, embodies truly extraordinary craftsmanship.
Video.title: Chris Ryan - Scarlet Lady

Video.summary: Behold "Outlaw" VIN #1! Mustang Brothers' supercharged '67 Fastback is a Brittany Blue beast.
Video.title: Mustang Brothers

Video.summary: Engine Power gets the honor of rebuilding the 640 inch blown nitrous injected V8.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 1

Video.summary: The team visits Kaase Racing to machine the 429 inch Ford big block from the first monster truck, Big Foot #1.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 2

Video.summary: Mike and Pat assemble and dyno tune massive 640 cubic inch tri-power 429 Ford with 871 blower and nitrous.
Video.title: Big Foot Engine Build Part 3

Video.summary: After 23 years in retirement, original BigFoot monster truck comes alive.
Video.title: BigFoot Lives

Video.summary: We tackle rust and lead filler removal on the 1961 Impala, restoring its trunk and body panels.
Video.title: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Image.alt: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Video.summary: We revamp a classic Impala with a 409 engine and hit the Year One Experience for muscle car fun.
Video.title: Red Sled gets a 409

Video.summary: Rick and Tommy finish Red Sled's steering, clutch and Air Ride systems. Learn how to rebuild a starter.
Video.title: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Image.alt: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Video.summary: Red Sled is finished. Look back at the entire build, and ride along on her maiden voyage.
Video.title: Red Sled Hits the Road

Video.summary: Ford’s high-revving modern engine gets some racy parts, then it is put to the test in the dyno cell!
Video.title: Coyote Power

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew pick up a late model Cadillac and prep it for some serious speed.
Video.title: Fancy and Fast

Video.summary: The guys install some drivetrain upgrades on their CTS-V, and paint some custom stripes on the 72 Chevelle.
Video.title: Caddy Drivetrain and Chevelle Stripes

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy wrap up their Cadillac CTSV Build with a few final details.
Video.title: Cadillac CTSV- Hammer it Home

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys take their souped-up Cadillac CTS-V for a spin.
Video.title: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Image.alt: Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool
Cadillac Donuts and Chevelle Keeps it Cool

Video.summary: Tommy and Marc give us some tips on painting trim and glass installation.
Video.title: Buick Regal Paint and Trim

Video.title: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Image.alt: Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing
Street Regal Wiring and Sound Proofing

Video.summary: Street Regal gets an updated custom interior to complement it' custom paint.
Video.title: Street Regal Interior/Payoff

Video.summary: The guys drag a classic Chevy out of a hay barn.
Video.title: Barn Find Bow Tie

Video.summary: 'The guys install a plethora of new body panels on their barn-find Chevelle.
Video.title: Sheetmetal Makeover

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew Upgrades the suspension on a classic Chevelle for corner carving and high end handling
Video.title: Chevelle - New Legs

Video.title: Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Barn Find Chevelle: Shiny Bits and Panel Fits

Video.summary: A frame-off Chevelle Barn find restoration continues with a dazzling metallic baby blue paint job.
Video.title: 72 Chevelle: Baby Blue

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle guys install a brand new interior in their ’72 Chevelle project.
Video.title: Chevelle Inside Out

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy work on getting the 1972 Chevelle Supercharger Innercooler plumbed.

Image.alt: Barn Find Chevelle - The Supercharged Plumber

Video.summary: Marc and Tommy finish up the barn find Chevelle build and take it to a famous road in the Smoky Mountains.

Video.summary: This 1970 Mustang will take a 50 year leap into the future, and we're building it to give away!
Video.title: EBC Mustang Sweepstakes Project

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle team dives into building a solid foundation for this Resto Mod.
Video.title: Mustang Backside Alterations

Video.summary: Shane Lile's purple-over-red '55 Chevy Bel Air Gasser: an eye-popping, custom drag strip beast!
